entries.label: Each of the following questions must be answered during each inspection. This form of written communication is not intended to replace verbal communication. If you notate a problem with the property, you are expected to notify the Manager immediately
Please be specific when describing the work being performed and do not  forget to include the location.
Are the following settings in compliance with the restrictions?
